scripts.dev:hpi: npm run convert -- hpi && slidev decks/hpi/slides.md --open
scripts.build:hpi: npm run convert -- hpi && slidev build decks/hpi/slides.md --out ../../dist/hpi && mkdir -p dist/hpi/share && cp decks/hpi/share/index.html dist/hpi/share/index.html && cp public/hpi-deck.pdf dist/hpi/hpi-deck.pdf
